conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
# Pre-Game Reflection

I felt most connected to J, F, and H. With J, we immediately clicked on the idea of working together strategically and comparing notes before committing to anything. F and I had a genuine conversation about the pressure of the game and built real trust, agreeing to look out for each other regardless of what happened. H brought a similar cautious, observant approach that felt aligned with mine—we both wanted to feel people out before making moves and committed to checking in once the game started.

I felt least connected to D, though not in a negative way—our conversation was more surface-level and transactional, lacking the deeper rapport I built with others. We acknowledged we were in similar situations but didn't establish any real plan to work together or stay in touch.

I made informal agreements with several people to compare notes before the game started and to look out for each other during play. I also suggested to G that we grab a drink after to debrief. Going in, I trust J, B, F, H, C, E, and A—they all seemed genuinely focused on their families and open to collaboration rather than pure greed. I don't specifically distrust anyone, but I'm most cautious about people I didn't connect with as deeply, since I have less insight into their actual intentions.
